nasb.text: ‘Now if his offering is a sacrifice of peace offerings, if he is going to offer out of the herd, whether male or female, he shall offer it without defect before the Lord.

esv.text: “If his offering is a sacrifice of peace offering, if he offers an animal from the herd, male or female, he shall offer it without blemish before the Lord.

cnv.text: “人的供物若是作平安祭，如果獻的是牛，必須在耶和華面前獻一頭沒有殘疾的公牛或母牛；

ccb.text: “如果有人用牛献作平安祭，必须在耶和华面前献上毫无残疾的公牛或母牛。
